core_principles: Speed over Decoration: Students need to log expenses in <3 seconds.
Green is Growth: Use Green (#10B981) for positive reinforcement (Budget left), not just currency.
White Space is Luxury: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) to make the app feel expensive even if the student is broke.
Data needs Breathing Room: Don't cram charts. One chart per view.
anti_patterns: No Dark Mode by default (User requested Clean White).
No Complex gradients (Keep it flat or subtle).
No 'Inter' for Headings (Use 'DM Sans' or System Bold).

tech_stack_constraints.styling: StyleSheet with Design System Constants (or NativeWind if configured)

images.logo: Use a simple Text Logo 'Waltrack' with a Green Dot '.' at the end.
images.empty_state: Use a large gray icon (e.g., 'wallet-outline' size 80) with opacity 0.3.

components.name: Balance Card
components.style: Full Width, Green Gradient or Solid Primary, Rounded XL
components.content: Total Balance (Large Text), Monthly Budget Label

components.name: Daily Progress
components.content: Progress Bar (Green filled), 'Spent today: $X / Daily Limit'

components.name: Amount Input
components.style: Massive Text (64px), Center Aligned, Auto Focus

components.name: Submit Button
components.style: Floating Bottom or Fixed Bottom, Full Width, Green

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'react-native-gifted-charts' and 'nativewind' (if possible) or use the Design System constants provided.
2. NAVIGATION: Use Expo Router (app/ directory). Create tabs in 'app/(tabs)' and stack for modals.
3. STATE: Use 'AsyncStorage' for local data persistence. Create a simple 'TransactionContext' or Hook.
4. COMPONENTS: Create reusable 'Card', 'Button', 'Typography' components wrapped in safe areas.
5. STYLING: Apply the 'clean white' theme. Avoid dark backgrounds unless it's a specific 'dark mode' toggle (not MVP).
6. ACCESSIBILITY: Add 'accessibilityLabel' to all buttons and inputs. Use proper contrast (Green text on White bg is tricky, check contrast - use Dark Green for text).
7. DATA-TESTID: Add 'testID' prop to all interactive elements for testing.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure touch targets are at least 44x44 points.
